events.event_description: U.S. ambassadorial relations with Cabo Verde established when the first Ambassador, Melissa Foelsch Wells, presented credentials. No resident embassy yet existed.

evidence.quote: Melissa Foelsch Wells, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1976-09-16. Credentials presented: 1976-11-18. Left post on 1977-03-23. ... Note: During Marks's tenure as non-resident Ambassador, Embassy Praia was established on January 28, 1978

events.event_description: Embassy Praia was formally established, elevating U.S. representation from a nonresident ambassadorship to a resident embassy.

evidence.quote: Note: During Marks's tenure as non-resident Ambassador, Embassy Praia was established on January 28, 1978, with Howard McGowan as Charge d'affaires ad interim.
